name: Intercept Wave
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>妨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>害</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>電</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>でん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>波</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぱ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: All Synchro Monsters on the field are changed to Defense Position. And then, return all face-up Synchro Monsters to the Extra Deck during the End Phase.
eff: All Synchro Monsters on the field are changed to Defense Position. And then, return all face-up Synchro Monsters to the Extra Deck during the End Phase.

action: Returns from field to Extra Deck
